snippet.title: Ripper - The Wanted Killer ft. @Karikku | Irul | Netflix India
snippet.description:
What happens when five friends decide to get together for a couple of drinks and risk a close encounter of the murderous kind?

A serial killer, crippling fear and paranoia: Are their fears misplaced, or are they warranted?

Find out how the night unfolds, and if you’re looking for another old-fashioned whodunit, catch Fahadh Faasil and Soubin Shahir in Irul, now streaming on Netflix.

Written & Directed by Nikhil Prasad
Cast: Anu K Aniyan, Arjun Ratan, Jeevan Stephen, Sabareesh Sajjin, Kiran Viyyath, Unni Mathews

DOP/Art: Sunil Karthikeyan
Edit: Anand Mathews
BGM and Sound Design: Charles Nazareth
Sound Engineer: Jishnu Ram
Poster Design: Binoy John
Associate Camera: Blessan K Mon
Colorist: Srik Varier 
DI Studio: Poetic prism and pixels studio
Production Coordinator: Biju Narayan
Production Assistants: Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu
Subtitles: Elvis John, Reem Nassim
Focus Puller: Appu
Gaffer: Binu P Varghese
Assistant Camera: Renju Jose
Camera Rentals: Mega Focus
Camera Team: Jinesh Balan, Shaji KK, Chandhu
Lights Rentals: Before & After Film Productions
Gimbal: Sachin, Pranav 
News Anchor’s Makeup: Irine’s Bluntbay
Art Assistants: Biju Narayan, Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu

Follow Netflix India on:
Website: https://www.netflix.com/
YouTube: http://bit.ly/NetflixIndiaYT
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/netflix_in
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/NetflixIN
Twitter: http://twitter.com/netflixindia

#Karikku #Irul #FahadhFaasil #NetflixIndia

snippet.title: Prelude of Pushparaj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Prelude of Pushparaj on Mythri Movie Makers. Pushpa is an upcoming Telugu action thriller drama film, with Allu Arjun and Rashmika Mandanna in the lead roles along with Prakash Raj and Jagapathi Babu in key roles & Fahadh Faasil as villain. Written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media. Devi Sri Prasad scoring music. The film will be released in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Tamil, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam languages.

#Pushpa​ #PreludeOfPushparaj #AlluArjun​ #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Click here to watch:

Uppena Deleted scene: https://youtu.be/TZGY-HJNt5g​

#AA20​ Movie Launch : https://youtu.be/cs_drz6Ps5I​

Rangasthalam Full Video Songs 4K : http://bit.ly/2tUdUsD​

Rangasthalam Songs Making : http://bit.ly/2KXeo8B​

Srimanthudu Full Movie : https://youtu.be/LS6XiINMc2s​

Janatha Garage Full Movie : https://youtu.be/_Nq2m5LRQ3g​

https://youtu.be/_5OjYjB80go​

snippet.title: Lehja | Abhi Dutt ft. Faisu & Jannat | Vikram M | Official Video | Romantic Song 2021 | Blive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents the most romantic hindi song of the year "Lehja" sung by Abhi Dutt Featuring Faisu & Jannat Zubair. The lyrics are penned by Azeem Shirazi and the music is directed by Vikram Montrose song directed by Rahul Shetty. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja

#Lehja #Fainat #AbhiDutt #NewHindiSong #LoveSongs2021

Song - Lehja
Composer- Vikram Montrose
Singer - Abhi Dutt
Lyrics - Azeem Shirazi

snippet.description:
Kitchens Koncepts & Dekors

snippet.title: Breaking News : Bijapur नक्सली हमले में 20 जवानों के शव और बरामद, कुल 22 जवान शहीद
snippet.description:
छत्तीसगढ़ के बीजापुर में हुए नक्सली हमले में 20 और जवानों के शव बरामद किए गए हैं. सूबे के डीजी डीएम अवस्थी ने इस बात की पुष्टि की है. अबतक कुल 22 शव बरामद किए गए हैं. अब भी एक जवान लापता है. कुल 31 जवान घायल हैं. यह इस साल का सबसे बड़ा नक्सली हमला है. 
#AajTakHD #HindiNews #AajTak #aajtaklivetv #aajtakhindi 
#today_breaking_news #aajtak

snippet.description:
S8UL IS PROUD TO SHOWCASE ONE OF THE MOST LUXURIOUS gaming facility in India. 
Valuating at 1 Million Dollar and built at 15000 sq. feet, it will be also the largest gaming facility in India.
@MortaL @8bit Thug and @8bit Goldy show you around this exclusive facility with a whopping 4 floors with all the state of art facility, which includes Streaming Cabins, Living Rooms, Recreational Areas, Modern Kitchen and Content Creation Space for all our Athletes and Content Creators.
We at S8UL, thank you all for making this possible and we ensure this is JUST THE BEGINNING.

Marriage is a beautiful bond of beautiful souls coming together, all we got to say is that love each other, understand and respect each other. Life is truly beautiful
love,

snippet.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2021 : ২য় দফায় রণক্ষেত্র নন্দীগ্রাম, রক্তাক্ত কেশপুর, ভোট পড়ল ৮০%
snippet.description:
নন্দীগ্রামের ভোটকে কেন্দ্র করে তুলকালাম ব্যাটলগ্রাউন্ড বয়াল। প্রায় দু’ঘণ্টা বুথের ভিতরেই রইলেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। বাইরে তখন সম্মুখসমরে তৃণমূল ও বিজেপির কর্মী সমর্থকরা। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেই, একের পর এক ঘটনায় উত্তপ্ত ছিল গোটা নন্দীগ্রাম। ভোট শুরু হতে না হতেই নন্দীগ্রামের মির্জাচকে তৃণমূল কর্মীদের ভোটদানে বাধা দেওয়ার অভিযোগ ওঠে কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনীর বিরুদ্ধে। অন্যদিকে নন্দীগ্রাম এক নম্বর ব্লকে সাত সকালেই বাইক বাহিনীর দাপট দেখা যায়। বাইকে কোনও দলের ঝান্ডা না থাকলেও, বিজেপি অভিযোগ করে, এই বাইক মিছিল করে তৃণমূল। নির্বাচন কমিশনে অভিযোগ জানানো হয়। নন্দীগ্রামের গড়চক্রবেড়িয়ায় লাঠিচার্জ করে জমায়েত হটিয়ে দেয় পুলিশ ও কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনী। পালাতে গিয়ে ডোবায় পড়ে যান এক ব্যক্তি। বুথের আশেপাশে এবং রাস্তায় অবৈধ জমায়েত হঠাতে রাস্তায় নামেন নন্দীগ্রাম থানার দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত আইপিএস অফিসার নগেন্দ্রনাথ ত্রিপাঠী। এদিকে নন্দীগ্রামের ওসমানচকে অন্যের হয়ে ভোট দেওয়ার সময় হাতেনাতে ধরা পড়েন শেখ হানিফ নামে এক ব্যক্তি। সোনাচূড়ার নেতাজি মোড় এলাকায় বুধবার রাত থেকেই শুরু হয়েছিল বোমাবাজি। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেও এলাকায় ছিল আতঙ্কের ছায়া। সব মিলিয়ে এবারের ভোটে সবথেকে চর্চিত কেন্দ্র নন্দীগ্রাম দিনভর ঘটনাবহুল।


#BengalElections2021 #Nandigram #Bayal #MamataBanerjee #SuvenduAdhikari #ABPAnanda #ABPLive

localized.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2021 : ২য় দফায় রণক্ষেত্র নন্দীগ্রাম, রক্তাক্ত কেশপুর, ভোট পড়ল ৮০%
localized.description:
নন্দীগ্রামের ভোটকে কেন্দ্র করে তুলকালাম ব্যাটলগ্রাউন্ড বয়াল। প্রায় দু’ঘণ্টা বুথের ভিতরেই রইলেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। বাইরে তখন সম্মুখসমরে তৃণমূল ও বিজেপির কর্মী সমর্থকরা। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেই, একের পর এক ঘটনায় উত্তপ্ত ছিল গোটা নন্দীগ্রাম। ভোট শুরু হতে না হতেই নন্দীগ্রামের মির্জাচকে তৃণমূল কর্মীদের ভোটদানে বাধা দেওয়ার অভিযোগ ওঠে কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনীর বিরুদ্ধে। অন্যদিকে নন্দীগ্রাম এক নম্বর ব্লকে সাত সকালেই বাইক বাহিনীর দাপট দেখা যায়। বাইকে কোনও দলের ঝান্ডা না থাকলেও, বিজেপি অভিযোগ করে, এই বাইক মিছিল করে তৃণমূল। নির্বাচন কমিশনে অভিযোগ জানানো হয়। নন্দীগ্রামের গড়চক্রবেড়িয়ায় লাঠিচার্জ করে জমায়েত হটিয়ে দেয় পুলিশ ও কেন্দ্রীয় বাহিনী। পালাতে গিয়ে ডোবায় পড়ে যান এক ব্যক্তি। বুথের আশেপাশে এবং রাস্তায় অবৈধ জমায়েত হঠাতে রাস্তায় নামেন নন্দীগ্রাম থানার দায়িত্বপ্রাপ্ত আইপিএস অফিসার নগেন্দ্রনাথ ত্রিপাঠী। এদিকে নন্দীগ্রামের ওসমানচকে অন্যের হয়ে ভোট দেওয়ার সময় হাতেনাতে ধরা পড়েন শেখ হানিফ নামে এক ব্যক্তি। সোনাচূড়ার নেতাজি মোড় এলাকায় বুধবার রাত থেকেই শুরু হয়েছিল বোমাবাজি। বৃহস্পতিবার সকাল থেকেও এলাকায় ছিল আতঙ্কের ছায়া। সব মিলিয়ে এবারের ভোটে সবথেকে চর্চিত কেন্দ্র নন্দীগ্রাম দিনভর ঘটনাবহুল।


#BengalElections2021 #Nandigram #Bayal #MamataBanerjee #SuvenduAdhikari #ABPAnanda #ABPLive

snippet.title: NEW PUNJABI SONG | DARANI JITHANI 2  | Mr Mrs Narula | Gursewak likhari | LATEST PUNJABI SONG 2021
snippet.description:

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.

Credits:

Movie : Kodiyil Oruvan
Starring: Vijay Antony, Aathmika, Ramachandra Raju, Prabhakar & Others
Writer & Director: Ananda Krishnan
Producer: T.D. Rajha & D.R. Sanjay Kumar (Chendur Film International)
Co Producer: Kamal Bohra, Lalitha Dhananjayan, B. Pradeep, Pankaj Bohra, S. Vikram Kumar 
Music: Nivas K Prasanna
Cinematographer: N.S. Uthaya Kumar
Editor: Vijay Antony

Contact for Wedding Shoot/Pre-Wedding Shoot//Photography/Video Album Shoot/Editing Business No. - 6207807047

song lyric
KULHI GITIL

 Kulhi gitil Gati hara, 
Minan Gate tangi tanra, 
Tisem idin Gate ape orak,

am nutum sasang sari 
benaoo minak sakom Churi,
lay me tisok gatin idiy sari.. 

Aeganj apunj saprao
 more horak neda din 
Unrenj badiy amak sasang Sari 
Dawra renj horog amak sakom churi,, 

Katha gatin sariy tam 
seterok ann rajan bhajan 
Sindur baha Ten baha me 
Rahi chawdal atenin idi miya...!

katha gatem iman kan  
Katha alum hirin tam,   
Inn man guni bhavie setak tikin,              tisem seterok Sari rajan bhajan,, 
 
hoy hudur bijili jari.   Nenda din Inn
seter Sari samaj tala khon inn apnar me Jay jug lagit Ten bundi miya,,


Lyric. Love boy

snippet.title: PESHAWARI CHAWAL | Pakistan Special Golden Pulao Recipe Cooking in Indian Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
The world has a lot of most tasty pulao recipes with different names like Chana Mewa Pulao, Zaiqa Chawal, and more. Today we cook Pakistan's special Beef Chana Mewa Pulao recipe using mutton instead of Beef.

We use Chana and Dry grapes as the main ingredients for this pulao recipe.

That taste is delicious!

snippet.title: कोल्ड कोको ड्रिंक बनाने की विधि - Surti Cold Cocoa / Summer Drink Recipe - CookingShooking
snippet.description:
Dosto, Surat ki famous Cold Coco Recipe share kar raha hu, garmi bhagane ke lie mast recipe hai ye.. Super Chilled Chocolate drink hai ye, cocoa powder, doodh, corn flour se banti hai easily :)

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Ingredients : 
Doodh / Milk - 600ml / 2 glass
Corn Flour - 2 tbsp
Cocoa Powder - 2 tbsp
Cheeni - 4 tbsp
Dark Chocolate - 70g
Ice Cubes - serving ke lie

Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Fakhar Zaman reflects on his spectacular 193-run record knock
snippet.description:
💬  "𝘐𝘵 𝘧𝘦𝘦𝘭𝘴 𝘨𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵 𝘣𝘶𝘵 𝘪𝘵 𝘸𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘣𝘦𝘵𝘵𝘦𝘳 𝘪𝘧 𝘸𝘦 𝘩𝘢𝘥 𝘸𝘰𝘯."

Fakhar Zaman reflects on his spectacular 193-run record knock

snippet.title: Bicycle Bhais | Web Series | Episode 3 | But Why ? | Popcorn Stories
snippet.description:
Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 3 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

snippet.title: आई कुठे काय करते 3rd April Full Episode | Aai Kuthe Kay Karte Today's Episode Update | Star Pravah
snippet.description:
स्टार प्रवाहवरील आई कुठे काय करते मालिकेत अनिरूद्ध ईशाच्या वागण्याचा दोष आईला देतो. ईशा साहिलला फोन करून आपण पळून जाऊया म्हणते. तेव्हा साहिल तिला तू अजून लहान आहे सांगत फोन ठेवतो. साहिलचं वागणं पाहून ईशालाही धक्का बसतो. काय घडणार मालिकेच्या आजच्या भागात.. पहा आजच्या एपिसोड अपडेटमध्ये. 

Reporter- Darshana Tamboli, 
Video Editor- Omkar Ingale. 

#AaiKutheKayKarteTodayEpisode #आईकुठेकायकरते #StarPravah

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 02 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Double Masala chicken Dum Biryani Recipe in Telugu || Homemade chicken Dum Biryani ||  Vismai Food
snippet.description:
Double Masala chicken Dum Biryani Recipe in Telugu | Vismai Food
#VismaiFood #DumBiryani #Biryani

Detailed recipes with Ingredients and Method in English & Telugu visit https://www.vismaifood.com/

Hello Foodies,

Today we are going to see the most requested recipe in votings Double masala chicken Dum Biryani recipe along with vismai food tips and measurements.

We already have uploaded multiple dum biryani recipes in different varieties like Hyderabadi Dum Biryanai, Mugalai Dum Biryanai, Muslim wedding style biryani, Andhra Natu Kodi Biryani, Chicken Tikka Biryani and many more but this Double masala chicken dum biryani is bit different more spicy and more tasty too.

Hope you try this recipe this weekend, please don't forget to share the tried recipe pics to our Insta handle.

snippet.title: Nandini - Episode 499 | 02 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the Super hit Serial "Nandini" that airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar a rich influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagamî, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekharís past misdeed and regain the three ëKalachakramí .

snippet.title: Mazhai Mazhai (Video Song) THALAIVI | Kangana Ranaut | Saindhavi Prakash| GV Prakash Kumar| Madhan K
snippet.description:
T-Series Tamil Presenting An official song Mazhai Mazhai from the upcoming Bollywood movie Thalaivi by Saindhavi Prakash, music by G V Prakash Kumar, lyrics penned by Madhan Karky.

THALAIVI chronicles the life and times of the legend – Jayalalithaa! For the first time, the untold story of Amma- the nation’s revolutionary hero is being portrayed on the big screen. The film will showcase Jayalalithaa’s inspirational journey from a 16-year old debutant in the world of Tamil cinema who goes on to become a superstar and eventually becomes Thalaivia revolutionary leader.

The iconic story is being portrayed by the iconic actor Kangana Ranaut. Opposite to her stars Arvind Swami as MGR - Thalaivi’s inspiration, love interest, and mentor.

#Thalaivi #KanganaRanaut #ArvindSwami #GVPrakashKumar #TamilHits #TamilLatestSong

Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Kartharai Dheivamaaga | John Jebaraj | Official Video | Tamil Christian Song | Levi Ministries
snippet.description:
Song Credits: 
Music By : John Jebaraj 
Lyrics, Tune and Composed by : John Jebaraj. 
Sung by : Eva. Victor Dorai, Eva. Kiruba Victor & John Jebaraj 
Keys arrangements : Derrick Paul 
Rhythm : Derrick Paul 
Vocals recorded @ Karunya Media, Coimbatore 
Mix and Master : Bro. David Selvam
Visual & Edit : Seven Media, Coimbatore.

Lyrics
Kartharai Dheivamaaga Kondoar
Idhuvarayil Vetkapattadhilla 
Avarayae Aadharavaai Kondoar 
Naduvazhiyil Nindrupoavadhilla

Vaendumpoadhellam En Badhilaanaarae 
Vaazhkai Muzhuvadhum En Thunayaanaarae 
Jebikkum Poadhellam En Badhilaanaarae 
Vaazhkai Muzhuvadhum En Thunayaanaarae 

Chorus : 
Aaraadhippoamae Avarai Muzhumanadhaai
Aaraadhippoamae Avarai Thalaimurayaai 

Verse 1
Verumayaanadhai Munnarindhadhaal
Thaedivandhu En Padagil Yaerikkondaarae 
Iravu Muzhuvadhum Prayaasappattum
Nirambaadha En Padagai Nirappivittaarae 

Verse 2

Vaakku Thandhadhil Kondu Saerdhida 
Paadhayellam Nizhazhaaga Kooda Vandhaarae 
Poagum Vazhiyellaam Unavaanaarae 
Vaakku Thandha Kaanaanai Kaiyalithaarae

LEVI MINISTRIES. All rights reserved.

snippet.title: $100 South Indian Food - GIANT 19 ITEMS THALI | Chettinad (Tamil Nadu) Crab Curry!
snippet.description:
🎥 Golden Crab Yolk - Thai Seafood Meal: https://youtu.be/T_5ctDxhhXM
📍 Sri Ananda Bhawan Bangkok: https://g.page/srianandabhawanbkk?share
👕 T-shirts and caps available now: https://migrationology.com/store/

BANGKOK, THAILAND - Welcome to Sri Ananda Bhawan, one of the best South Indian food restaurants in Bangkok that specializes in food from Chettinad in Tamil Nadu, South India. Today, we’re going to eat the giant 3,000 THB (around $100) banana leaf thali, that includes 19 different dishes! #IndianFood #Bangkok #Thailand

Chettinad is within the Tamil Nadu state of South India. The food is characterized by lots of chili powder, pepper, and curry leaves. When I heard about the massive 19 item thali, there was no way I could resist. Thanks to Sri Ananda Bhawan and Mr. Rachan, for allowing me to see inside the kitchen as the talented Chef’s prepared all 19 dishes. One of their most well known dishes is the Chettinad crab curry. Onions, tomatoes, garlic, curry leaves, chili powder, pepper, coriander, all tempered down, loaded with crab, Chettinad masala, and coconut milk. The result was something truly spectacular, a combination of spices and ingredients that any curry lover will fall in love with.

Along with the Chettinad crab curry there was chicken 65, fish 65, prawn 65, about three other prawn dishes, 2 mutton dishes, fish masala, tandoori fish, a variety of veg dishes, chicken curries, sambar, and rasam. All laid out on a banana leaf with rice, it was truly a special meal!

I would also mention that although I ordered the massive 19 item thali, which you have to actually pre-order (and I would highly recommend). You can additionally just walk in, and they have many other more simple thalis that you can order - including vegetarian, or just order single dishes. Amazing South Indian food, and specifically one of the only Chettinad restaurants in Bangkok, Thailand.

📍 Sri Ananda Bhawan Restaurant, Bangkok: https://g.page/srianandabhawanbkk?share

Thank you very much for watching this video, and hope you’re having a fantastic day!

🎵MUSIC: 
https://goo.gl/HwVjdo

snippet.description:
Virat decides to marry a girl of his mother's choice, much to the shock of Heer. Elsewhere, Jeet makes another attempt to end Soumya's life. Will she survive his vengeful attack?
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Throwback - Episode 2713 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Chhattisgarh Naxal Encounter: नक्सली कमांडर हिडमा पर हमले का आरोप, लगाया गया 25 लाख का इनामी
snippet.description:
Chhattisgarh के बीजापुर में सुरक्षाबलों और नक्सलियों के बीच मुठभेड़ हुई जिस दौरान 15 नक्सलियों के मारे गए. सूत्रों के अनुसार एनकाउंटर से पहले खुफिया एजेंसियों ने अलर्ट दिया था. बीजापुर, सुकमा ,कांकेर में 300 नक्सलियों के कैंप की खुफिया सूचना थी . वहीं नक्सलियों से मुठभेड़ में अब 20 और जवानों के शव मिले हैं और अब तक कुल  22 जवानों के शव मिल चुके हैं, 1 अभी भी लापता. खबर ये है कि नक्सली कमांडर हिडमा पर हमले का आरोप हैं जिसपर 25 लाख का इनामी लगाया गया है.
#BijapurNaxalAttack #ChhattisgarhNaxalEncounter #BreakingNews

snippet.title: Indians And Food Delivery || Nazarbattu
snippet.description:
For Binomo Education, Click https://bit.ly/3e06HzD  and get Rs.65,000 for Binomo tutorial.
Use "BS132" promo code for +100% on the first deposit. Thank me later!  
Risk Warning! Your capital might be at risk!
Go subscribe to Binomo's Official Instagram Account - https://www.instagram.com/binomo/

India is an amazing country where a food delivery boy beats a girl for complaining about the food but the controversy takes a U-turn when the delivery boy's angle of the story comes in media according to which the girl had created the whole scene to avoid payment. We all order food online and have our sweet and bitter experiences with food delivery guys. Stories like zomato delivery guy eating food, people increasing waiting time in order to claim free food. In the end Zomato and swiggy delivery guys fill our empty stomachs and bring smiles to our faces.
Here we have tried to pick some funny moments of Indians and food delivery guys. We respect the profession and the companies who are in the business. Enjoy the video and next time when you order food say big thanks to the delivery guy because these guys were out when the whole country was in lockdown.
Share the video with your loved ones and spread laughter.
#onlineorder #fooddelivery

snippet.description:
Hit the bell and subscribe to stay connected with Har Pal Geo's collection of Pakistani dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 02 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: Maharashtra Second Lockdown : 2 एप्रिलनंतर लॉकडाऊनची शक्यता, नवे नियम काय असू शकतात?
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्रात लॉकडाऊन ( Maharashtra Lockdown )लागणार की नाही, अशी धाकधूक लागलेली असतानाच आता एक मोठी शक्यता समोर आली आहे. महाराष्ट्रात 2 एप्रिलपासून ( 2 April 2021 ) लॉकडाऊन लागण्याची तयारी सुरु झाली असल्याची माहिती आहे. मिड डे ( Mid Day ) या इंग्रजी वृत्तपत्राने आपल्या सुत्रांच्या हवाल्याने याबाबतचं वृत्त दिलं आहे. मात्र, हा लॉकडाऊन मागील लॉकडाऊनहून ( Corona Lockdown Again ) काहीसा वेगळा असेल...काहिसा वेगळा म्हणजे नेमका ( Lockdown Guidelines ) कसा हेच आपण आजच्या व्हिडीओत समजून घेऊया

#MaharashtraLockdown #LockdownAgain #LockdownGuidelines

localized.title: Maharashtra Second Lockdown : 2 एप्रिलनंतर लॉकडाऊनची शक्यता, नवे नियम काय असू शकतात?
localized.description:
महाराष्ट्रात लॉकडाऊन ( Maharashtra Lockdown )लागणार की नाही, अशी धाकधूक लागलेली असतानाच आता एक मोठी शक्यता समोर आली आहे. महाराष्ट्रात 2 एप्रिलपासून ( 2 April 2021 ) लॉकडाऊन लागण्याची तयारी सुरु झाली असल्याची माहिती आहे. मिड डे ( Mid Day ) या इंग्रजी वृत्तपत्राने आपल्या सुत्रांच्या हवाल्याने याबाबतचं वृत्त दिलं आहे. मात्र, हा लॉकडाऊन मागील लॉकडाऊनहून ( Corona Lockdown Again ) काहीसा वेगळा असेल...काहिसा वेगळा म्हणजे नेमका ( Lockdown Guidelines ) कसा हेच आपण आजच्या व्हिडीओत समजून घेऊया
